pain_points: Fragmented subscriber experience visibility across network domains requiring manual correlation across vendor-specific EMS, OSS platforms, and RAN analytics tools adding 15-30 minutes to MTTD
Extended MTTR due to manual root cause analysis workflows adding 30-90 minutes per incident across multiple logins and interfaces
Reactive troubleshooting driven by subscriber complaints rather than proactive detection with average MTTR of 2-4 hours for cell site issues
Insufficient real-time analytics for high-cardinality network data with 15-60 minute delays in detecting emerging problems using batch processing
Inability to correlate network events with subscriber behavior patterns requiring hours of manual log analysis across disparate systems
Lack of standardized KPIs and metrics framework across NOC teams with inconsistent definitions and incompatible dashboards preventing enterprise-wide benchmarking
use_cases: Proactive Network Capacity Planning & Congestion Management - Use historical trending, ML forecasting, and rollup aggregations to identify cells approaching capacity limits and optimize traffic distribution

Multi-Dimensional Network Incident Root Cause Analysis - Enable rapid root cause identification by correlating cell site performance, core network events, transport metrics, and external factors in unified Kibana Canvas workbooks

Subscriber-Centric Experience Monitoring & Troubleshooting - Provide complete visibility into individual subscriber network experience with IMSI-based correlation across all network touches and APM transaction tracing

Intelligent Anomaly Detection for Emerging Network Patterns - Leverage ML population analysis, time series analysis, and multi-metric analysis to detect subtle performance degradation trends and capacity saturation patterns

End-to-End Network Performance Benchmarking & Optimization - Establish data-driven optimization workflows with standardized KPI dashboards and cohort analysis across cell sites, vendors, regions, and technologies

Real-Time Cell Site Performance Degradation Detection - Proactively identify cell sites experiencing performance degradation before subscriber impact escalates, reducing MTTD from 30+ minutes to under 5 minutes using ML anomaly detection and serial difference aggregations

Automated Network Event Correlation & Root Cause Inference - Reduce manual correlation time using APM correlation features, event enrichment pipelines, and incident signature pattern matching with percolate queries

Network Operations Command Center Unified Dashboard - Provide executive and NOC leadership with real-time situational awareness via Kibana Canvas with nationwide network health, incidents, and operational KPIs
customer_context.scale: 50,000+ cell sites nationwide, 100M+ active subscribers, billions of signaling events daily, multi-vendor RAN environment (Ericsson, Nokia, Samsung), 15+ regional NOC teams operating 24/7, 80+ core network elements (MME/SGW/PGW nodes)
metrics: network.radio.rsrp_dbm, network.radio.rsrq_db, network.radio.sinr_db - Radio signal quality measurements from UE reports
network.rrc.connection_success_rate - RRC connection establishment success rates with failure cause analysis
incident.mttr_minutes_avg and incident.mttd_minutes_avg - Mean time to repair and detect with trend indicators
network.transport.latency_ms and network.transport.packet_loss_pct - Backhaul transport performance on S1/X2 interfaces
kpi.network_availability_pct - Nationwide aggregate availability calculated as available cell-minutes / total cell-minutes
network.imsi cardinality - Unique subscriber activity per cell site/MME for concentration anomaly detection
network.procedure.success_rate_pct - Procedure success/failure rates for Initial Attach, Service Request, TAU, Handover, PDN Connection
network.handover.outcome - X2 and S1 handover success rates and execution times by cell neighbor pair
ml.anomaly_score - ML-detected anomalies in time-series metrics with typical vs actual value comparison
network.voice.call_drop_rate and network.data.session_drop_rate - Voice and data session quality metrics
subscriber.experience.score - Composite subscriber experience score (0-100) from latency, throughput, and QoE metrics
network.anomaly.imsi_churn_rate_pct - Percentage change in unique IMSI counts indicating cell degradation
network.cell.prb_utilization_dl_pct and network.cell.prb_utilization_ul_pct - Physical Resource Block utilization for capacity monitoring
network.auth.result - HSS authentication responses and APN authorization results from S6a interface
network.cell.availability_pct - Cell site availability percentage from eNodeB/gNodeB PM counters
